titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding the Child of Adultery and the Foundling
Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding the Child of Adultery and the Foundling

segments:
Hadith.3528 - It is narrated from Sa'id ibn Yasar, who said:
"Abu Abdullah (as), said: 'There is no harm in emancipating the child born out of wedlock.' "
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3528 - It is narrated from Sa'id ibn Yasar, who said:
"Abu Abdullah (as), said: 'There is no harm in emancipating the child born out of wedlock.' "

narratorChain.raw: 3528 - رَوَى سَعِيدُ بْنُ يَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding the Child of Adultery and the Foundling

segments: : قُلْتُ لَهُ جَارِيَةٌ لِي زَنَتْ أَبِيعُ وَلَدَهَا قَالَ "نَعَمْ" قُلْتُ أَحُجُّ بِثَمَنِهِ قَالَ "نَعَمْ".
arabic.text: : قُلْتُ لَهُ جَارِيَةٌ لِي زَنَتْ أَبِيعُ وَلَدَهَا قَالَ "نَعَمْ" قُلْتُ أَحُجُّ بِثَمَنِهِ قَالَ "نَعَمْ".

segments:
Hadith.3529 - It is narrated from Anbasa ibn Mus'ab that he said:
"I said to Abu Abdullah (as): 'A bondwoman of mine committed adultery. Can I sell her child?'
Imam (as) said: 'Yes.'
I said: 'Can I perform Hajj with its price?'
Imam (as) said: 'Yes.' "
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3529 - It is narrated from Anbasa ibn Mus'ab that he said:
"I said to Abu Abdullah (as): 'A bondwoman of mine committed adultery. Can I sell her child?'
Imam (as) said: 'Yes.'
I said: 'Can I perform Hajj with its price?'
Imam (as) said: 'Yes.' "

narratorChain.raw: 3529 - وَ رَوَى عَنْبَسَةُ بْنُ مُصْعَبٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding the Child of Adultery and the Foundling

segments: : سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ وَلَدِ اَلزِّنَا أَ يُشْتَرَى أَوْ يُبَاعُ أَوْ يُسْتَخْدَمُ قَالَ "نَعَمْ إِلاَّ جَارِيَةً لَقِيطَةً فَإِنَّهَا لاَ تُشْتَرَى".
arabic.text: : سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ وَلَدِ اَلزِّنَا أَ يُشْتَرَى أَوْ يُبَاعُ أَوْ يُسْتَخْدَمُ قَالَ "نَعَمْ إِلاَّ جَارِيَةً لَقِيطَةً فَإِنَّهَا لاَ تُشْتَرَى".

segments:
Hadith.3530 - It is narrated from Hammad, from Al-Halabi, who said:
"Abu Abdullah (as), was asked about a child born out of adultery-can he be bought, sold, or used for service?
Imam (as) said: 'Yes, except for a foundling girl (abandoned by parents), as she cannot be bought.' "
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3530 - It is narrated from Hammad, from Al-Halabi, who said:
"Abu Abdullah (as), was asked about a child born out of adultery-can he be bought, sold, or used for service?
Imam (as) said: 'Yes, except for a foundling girl (abandoned by parents), as she cannot be bought.' "

narratorChain.raw: 3530 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادٌ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding the Child of Adultery and the Foundling

segments: : "اَلْمَنْبُوذُ حُرٌّ إِنْ شَاءَ جَعَلَ وَلاَءَهُ لِلَّذِينَ رَبَّوْهُ وَ إِنْ شَاءَ لِغَيْرِهِمْ".
arabic.text: : "اَلْمَنْبُوذُ حُرٌّ إِنْ شَاءَ جَعَلَ وَلاَءَهُ لِلَّذِينَ رَبَّوْهُ وَ إِنْ شَاءَ لِغَيْرِهِمْ".

segments:
Hadith.3531 - It is narrated from Hammad bin Isa, from Hariz, from Abu Abdullah (as):
"The abandoned child (foundling) is free. If he wishes, he may assign his allegiance to those who raised him, or if he wishes, to others."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3531 - It is narrated from Hammad bin Isa, from Hariz, from Abu Abdullah (as):
"The abandoned child (foundling) is free. If he wishes, he may assign his allegiance to those who raised him, or if he wishes, to others."

narratorChain.raw: 3531 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادُ بْنُ عِيسَى عَنْ حَرِيزٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding the Child of Adultery and the Foundling

segments: رِوَايَةِ اَلْمُثَنَّى عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "إِنْ طَلَبَ اَلَّذِي رَبَّاهُ بِنَفَقَتِهِ وَ كَانَ مُوسِراً رَدَّ عَلَيْهِ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ مُوسِراً كَانَ مَا أَنْفَقَ صَدَقَةً".
arabic.text: رِوَايَةِ اَلْمُثَنَّى عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "إِنْ طَلَبَ اَلَّذِي رَبَّاهُ بِنَفَقَتِهِ وَ كَانَ مُوسِراً رَدَّ عَلَيْهِ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ مُوسِراً كَانَ مَا أَنْفَقَ صَدَقَةً".

segments:
Hadith.3532 - In the narration of Al-Muthanna, from Abu Abdullah (as):
"If the one who raised the abandoned child demands repayment for his expenses and he (the child) is financially capable, he must repay him. However, if he is not financially capable, then what was spent is considered charity."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3532 - In the narration of Al-Muthanna, from Abu Abdullah (as):
"If the one who raised the abandoned child demands repayment for his expenses and he (the child) is financially capable, he must repay him. However, if he is not financially capable, then what was spent is considered charity."

narratorChain.raw: وَفِي رِوَايَةِ الْمُثَنَّى عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ:

parts.text: َفِي رِوَايَةِ الْمُثَنَّى عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ:

titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding the Child of Adultery and the Foundling

segments: : فِي لَقِيطَةٍ وُجِدَتْ فَقَالَ "حُرَّةٌ لاَ تُشْتَرَى وَ لاَ تُبَاعُ وَ إِنْ كَانَ وُلِدَ مَمْلُوكٌ لَكَ مِنَ اَلزِّنَا فَأَمْسِكْ أَوْ بِعْ إِنْ أَحْبَبْتَ هُوَ مَمْلُوكٌ لَكَ".
arabic.text: : فِي لَقِيطَةٍ وُجِدَتْ فَقَالَ "حُرَّةٌ لاَ تُشْتَرَى وَ لاَ تُبَاعُ وَ إِنْ كَانَ وُلِدَ مَمْلُوكٌ لَكَ مِنَ اَلزِّنَا فَأَمْسِكْ أَوْ بِعْ إِنْ أَحْبَبْتَ هُوَ مَمْلُوكٌ لَكَ".

segments:
Hadith.3533 - Zurarah narrates from one of the Imams (as), peace be upon them, that Imam (as) said regarding a foundling:
"She is free and cannot be bought or sold. However, if a child is born to you from her through unlawful relations, then you may keep or sell the child if you wish, as he is your slave."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3533 - Zurarah narrates from one of the Imams (as), peace be upon them, that Imam (as) said regarding a foundling:
"She is free and cannot be bought or sold. However, if a child is born to you from her through unlawful relations, then you may keep or sell the child if you wish, as he is your slave."

narratorChain.raw: 3533 - وَ رَوَى زُرَارَةُ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ
